title: Vanity: Ornate Weaponry
description: Fancy new looks for your best weapons.
body:
A pack for the mod Vanity, adding tool skins based with a fancy look and dramatic feel.

When installed alongside Vanity: Core, Ornate Designs becomes available to the player
in the creative inventory and through villager trading.

Ornate Designs can be used at a Styling Table to modify the
appearance of higher-level Minecraft tools.

![Swords in Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a87df70eef7900463fe461e0c7b70772f810d6d.png)

![Armor Stands Holding Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01be5ee142b612dd91f82e3c62fd522d8aabe0f1.png)
